initial_program:
% --------------------------------------------------------------
% Grid dimensions
n_rows(N) :- N = #count{R : input(R, _, _) }.
n_cols(M) :- M = #count{C : input(_, C, _) }.
row(0..N-1) :- n_rows(N).
col(0..M-1) :- n_cols(M).

output_cell(R,C) :- row(R), col(C).

% --------------------------------------------------------------
% Ground row  the unique row that is completely filled with 5s
full5Row(R) :- row(R), #count{C : input(R, C, 5)} = #count{C2 : input(_, C2, _)}.
ground(G) :- full5Row(G).
% exactly one such row
:- #count{R : ground(R)} = 1.

% --------------------------------------------------------------
% Positions that contain a 2 or a 1 (at most one per column)
row2(C,R2) :- input(R2, C, 2).
row1(C,R1) :- input(R1, C, 1).

% --------------------------------------------------------------
% Colour 2  moves toward the ground
% Above ground  full band from the original 2 up to the row just above the ground row
output(R,C,2) :- row2(C,R2), ground(G), row(R), col(C),
    R2 < G, R2 <= R, R < G, not output(R,C,1).

% Below ground  rows whose distance from the ground is at most floor((distance)/2),
% plus the original cell
output(R,C,2) :- row2(C,R2), ground(G), row(R), col(C),
    R2 > G, G < R, R <= R2,
    (R - G) <= ((R2 - G) // 2),
    not output(R,C,1).

% Colour 1  moves away from the ground
% Above ground  rows from the top row down to the original 1 (inclusive)
output(R,C,1) :- row1(C,R1), ground(G), row(R), col(C),
    R1 < G, R <= R1, not output(R,C,2).

% Below ground  rows whose distance from the ground is at most floor((distance)/2),
% plus the original cell
output(R,C,1) :- row1(C,R1), ground(G), row(R), col(C),
    R1 > G, R >= R1,
    (R - G) <= ((R1 - G) // 2),
    not output(R,C,2).

% Ground row cells get colour 5 (and they must not be 2 or 1)
output(G,C,5) :- ground(G), col(C), not output(G,C,2), not output(G,C,1).

% All other cells become 0
output(R,C,0) :- output_cell(R,C),
    not output(R,C,2), not output(R,C,1), not output(R,C,5).

% Exactly one colour per cell
1 { output(R,C,Color) : color(Color) } 1 :- output_cell(R,C).

#show output/3.

rounds.program_after:
% --------------------------------------------------------------
% Grid dimensions
n_rows(N) :- N = #count{R : input(R, _, _) }.
n_cols(M) :- M = #count{C : input(_, C, _) }.
row(0..N-1) :- n_rows(N).
col(0..M-1) :- n_cols(M).

output_cell(R,C) :- row(R), col(C).

% --------------------------------------------------------------
% Ground row  the unique row that is completely filled with 5s
full5Row(R) :- row(R), #count{ C : input(R, C, 5) } = #count{ C2 : input(_, C2, _) }.
ground(G) :- full5Row(G).
% exactly one such row
:- #count{R : ground(R)} = 1.

% --------------------------------------------------------------
% Positions that contain a 2 or a 1 (at most one per column)
row2(C,R2) :- input(R2, C, 2).
row1(C,R1) :- input(R1, C, 1).

% --------------------------------------------------------------
% Colour 2  moves toward the ground
% Above ground  full band from the original 2 up to the row just above the ground row
output(R,C,2) :- row2(C,R2), ground(G), row(R), col(C),
    R2 < G, R2 <= R, R < G, not output(R,C,1).

% Below ground  rows whose distance from the ground is at most floor((distance)/2),
% plus the original cell
output(R,C,2) :- row2(C,R2), ground(G), row(R), col(C),
    R2 > G, G < R, R <= R2,
output(R,C,2) :- row2(C,R2), ground(G), row(R), col(C), R2 > G, G < R, R <= R2, (R - G) * 2 <= (R2 - G), not output(R,C,1).
    not output(R,C,1).

% Colour 1  moves away from the ground
% Above ground  rows from the top row down to the original 1 (inclusive)
output(R,C,1) :- row1(C,R1), ground(G), row(R), col(C),
    R1 < G, R <= R1, not output(R,C,2).

% Below ground  rows whose distance from the ground is at most floor((distance)/2),
% plus the original cell
output(R,C,1) :- row1(C,R1), ground(G), row(R), col(C),
    R1 > G, R >= R1,
output(R,C,1) :- row1(C,R1), ground(G), row(R), col(C), R1 > G, R >= R1, (R - G) * 2 <= (R1 - G), not output(R,C,2).
    not output(R,C,2).

% Ground row cells get colour 5 (and they must not be 2 or 1)
output(G,C,5) :- ground(G), col(C), not output(G,C,2), not output(G,C,1).

% All other cells become 0
output(R,C,0) :- output_cell(R,C),
    not output(R,C,2), not output(R,C,1), not output(R,C,5).

% Exactly one colour per cell
1 { output(R,C,Color) : color(Color) } 1 :- output_cell(R,C).

#show output/3.

rounds.program_after:
% --------------------------------------------------------------
% Grid dimensions
n_rows(N) :- N = #count{R : input(R, _, _) }.
n_cols(M) :- M = #count{C : input(_, C, _) }.
row(0..N-1) :- n_rows(N).
col(0..M-1) :- n_cols(M).

output_cell(R,C) :- row(R), col(C).

% --------------------------------------------------------------
% Ground row  the unique row that is completely filled with 5s
full5Row(R) :- row(R), #count{ C : input(R, C, 5) } = #count{ C2 : input(_, C2, _) }.
ground(G) :- full5Row(G).
% exactly one such row
:- #count{R : ground(R)} = 1.

% --------------------------------------------------------------
% Positions that contain a 2 or a 1 (at most one per column)
row2(C,R2) :- input(R2, C, 2).
row1(C,R1) :- input(R1, C, 1).

% --------------------------------------------------------------
% Colour 2  moves toward the ground
% Above ground  full band from the original 2 up to the row just above the ground row
output(R,C,2) :- row2(C,R2), ground(G), row(R), col(C),
    R2 < G, R2 <= R, R < G, not output(R,C,1).

% Below ground  rows whose distance from the ground is at most floor((distance)/2),
% plus the original cell
output(R,C,2) :- row2(C,R2), ground(G), row(R), col(C),
    R2 > G, G < R, R <= R2,
output(R,C,2) :- row2(C,R2), ground(G), row(R), col(C), R2 > G, G < R, R <= R2, (R - G) * 2 <= (R2 - G), not output(R,C,1).
    not output(R,C,1).

% Colour 1  moves away from the ground
% Above ground  rows from the top row down to the original 1 (inclusive)
output(R,C,1) :- row1(C,R1), ground(G), row(R), col(C),
    R1 < G, R <= R1, not output(R,C,2).

% Below ground  rows whose distance from the ground is at most floor((distance)/2),
% plus the original cell
output(R,C,1) :- row1(C,R1), ground(G), row(R), col(C),
    R1 > G, R >= R1,
output(R,C,1) :- row1(C,R1), ground(G), row(R), col(C), R1 > G, R >= R1, (R - G) * 2 <= (R1 - G), not output(R,C,2).
    not output(R,C,2).

% Ground row cells get colour 5 (and they must not be 2 or 1)
output(G,C,5) :- ground(G), col(C), not output(G,C,2), not output(G,C,1).

% All other cells become 0
output(R,C,0) :- output_cell(R,C),
    not output(R,C,2), not output(R,C,1), not output(R,C,5).

% Exactly one colour per cell
1 { output(R,C,Color) : color(Color) } 1 :- output_cell(R,C).

#show output/3.

% --------------------------------------------------------------
% Grid dimensions
n_rows(N) :- N = #count{R : input(R, _, _) }.
n_cols(M) :- M = #count{C : input(_, C, _) }.
row(0..N-1) :- n_rows(N).
col(0..M-1) :- n_cols(M).

output_cell(R,C) :- row(R), col(C).

% --------------------------------------------------------------
% Ground row  the unique row that is completely filled with 5s
full5Row(R) :- row(R), #count{ C : input(R, C, 5) } = #count{ C2 : input(_, C2, _) }.
ground(G) :- full5Row(G).
% exactly one such row
:- #count{R : ground(R)} = 1.

% --------------------------------------------------------------
% Positions that contain a 2 or a 1 (at most one per column)
row2(C,R2) :- input(R2, C, 2).
row1(C,R1) :- input(R1, C, 1).

% --------------------------------------------------------------
% Colour 2  moves toward the ground
% Above ground  full band from the original 2 up to the row just above the ground row
output(R,C,2) :- row2(C,R2), ground(G), row(R), col(C),
    R2 < G, R2 <= R, R < G, not output(R,C,1).

% Below ground  rows whose distance from the ground is at most floor((distance)/2),
% plus the original cell
output(R,C,2) :- row2(C,R2), ground(G), row(R), col(C),
    R2 > G, G < R, R <= R2,
output(R,C,2) :- row2(C,R2), ground(G), row(R), col(C), R2 > G, G < R, R <= R2, (R - G) * 2 <= (R2 - G), not output(R,C,1).
    not output(R,C,1).

% Colour 1  moves away from the ground
% Above ground  rows from the top row down to the original 1 (inclusive)
output(R,C,1) :- row1(C,R1), ground(G), row(R), col(C),
    R1 < G, R <= R1, not output(R,C,2).

% Below ground  rows whose distance from the ground is at most floor((distance)/2),
% plus the original cell
output(R,C,1) :- row1(C,R1), ground(G), row(R), col(C),
    R1 > G, R >= R1,
output(R,C,1) :- row1(C,R1), ground(G), row(R), col(C), R1 > G, R >= R1, (R - G) * 2 <= (R1 - G), not output(R,C,2).
    not output(R,C,2).

% Ground row cells get colour 5 (and they must not be 2 or 1)
output(G,C,5) :- ground(G), col(C), not output(G,C,2), not output(G,C,1).

% All other cells become 0
output(R,C,0) :- output_cell(R,C),
    not output(R,C,2), not output(R,C,1), not output(R,C,5).

% Exactly one colour per cell
1 { output(R,C,Color) : color(Color) } 1 :- output_cell(R,C).

#show output/3.
